creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also build my screen using a local poudriere on a very recent 14-CURRENT. I cannot reproduce your problem in any way, whether built by hand or using my poudriere.

What options are set? You can find them in your ${POURDRIERE_ETC}/poudriere.d directory. Can you post them for the screen port only, please.

Is this on amd64, i386, or other?
